# Original Description

Cant send transaction
Version 9.4
Daemon log:
`
2016-Nov-15 11:26:08.980471 [RPC0][on_send_raw_tx]: tx verification failed`

Wallet log:
```
2016-Nov-15 11:26:08.560999 [RPC0]amount=0.000300000000, real_output=2, real_output_in_tx_index=3, indexes: 33793 40890 59723 
2016-Nov-15 11:26:08.561256 [RPC0]amount=1.000000000000, real_output=2, real_output_in_tx_index=1, indexes: 505564 616685 829115 
2016-Nov-15 11:26:08.937536 [RPC0]amount=0.000300000000, real_output=2, real_output_in_tx_index=3, indexes: 35246 49048 59723 
2016-Nov-15 11:26:08.938010 [RPC0]amount=1.000000000000, real_output=2, real_output_in_tx_index=1, indexes: 205862 645565 829115 
2016-Nov-15 11:26:08.980714 [RPC0]ERROR /*/monero/src/wallet/wallet2.cpp:2496 daemon_send_resp.status != CORE_RPC_STATUS_OK. THROW EXCEPTION: error::tx_rejected
2016-Nov-15 11:26:08.981175 [RPC0]/*/monero/src/wallet/wallet2.cpp:2496:N5tools5error11tx_rejectedE: transaction was rejected by daemon, status = Failed, tx:

```


# Discussion History
## moneromooo-monero | 2016-11-15T11:55:54+00:00
in daemon: set_log 1

Then try again, it will have more info. If it's a double spend, do this in the wallet: rescan_spent


## 3junit | 2016-11-15T12:10:23+00:00
Output after set_log 1

```
2016-Nov-15 13:07:43.962504 [RPC0]transaction with hash 85d8e1b24a85ed527e58e60cb2797ba78085429974c37483a968baa1f66e0220 not found in db
2016-Nov-15 13:07:43.962647 [RPC0]transaction version 2 is higher than max accepted version 1
2016-Nov-15 13:07:43.962694 [RPC0]tx used wrong inputs, rejected
2016-Nov-15 13:07:43.962741 [RPC0]Transaction verification failed: <85d8e1b24a85ed527e58e60cb2797ba78085429974c37483a968baa1f66e0220>
2016-Nov-15 13:07:43.962789 [RPC0][on_send_raw_tx]: tx verification failed
2016-Nov-15 13:07:47.704578 [RPC0]tx with hash 1dc16c7087af12625777bc7d9244289e6e9d8f1e74bb83c6c3d2c87a3d185ffd not found in db
2016-Nov-15 13:07:47.784513 [RPC1]tx with hash 42c58b40b058e25368c7984ee634882658e4b007d3369661eaad071cdd53a5f9 not found in db

```


## moneromooo-monero | 2016-11-15T14:11:42+00:00
You are using an old daemon which does not support rct (or that daemon isn't synced).


## 3junit | 2016-11-21T13:02:09+00:00
@moneromooo-monero Update wallet and it works, Thank you!
